rawText:
{
  "freshness_score": 1,
  "trust_score": 1,
  "conversion_score": 1,
  "design_age_estimate": "severely_outdated",
  "summary": "The provided screenshots are completely blank white images, indicating a total failure to load content or a missing file, which prevents any visual assessment of the actual website design.",
  "issues": [
    {
      "id": "blank_screenshots",
      "severity": "critical",
      "title": "Screenshots are completely blank",
      "what_observed": "Both the desktop and mobile screenshots provided are entirely white with no visible text, images, buttons, or navigation elements.",
      "why_problem": "A visitor seeing a blank page assumes the website is broken, the business is closed, or it is a scam. It is impossible to trust a business that cannot display its own website.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "A fully rendered webpage with a visible header, navigation menu, hero section with an image, and clear call-to-action buttons.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Ensure the website files are correctly hosted and accessible. If this is a staging environment, ensure the correct URL is provided for the audit."
    }
  ],
  "positive_observations": [],
  "redesign_priorities": [
    "1. Resolve the blank page issue to ensure content is visible.",
    "2. Verify that the website is live and accessible to the public.",
    "3. Re-audit the actual website design once the visual content is available."
  ],
  "confidence": 0.0
}

parsedJson.summary: The provided screenshots are completely blank white images, indicating a total failure to load content or a missing file, which prevents any visual assessment of the actual website design.

issues.title: Screenshots are completely blank
issues.what_observed: Both the desktop and mobile screenshots provided are entirely white with no visible text, images, buttons, or navigation elements.
issues.why_problem: A visitor seeing a blank page assumes the website is broken, the business is closed, or it is a scam. It is impossible to trust a business that cannot display its own website.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A fully rendered webpage with a visible header, navigation menu, hero section with an image, and clear call-to-action buttons.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Ensure the website files are correctly hosted and accessible. If this is a staging environment, ensure the correct URL is provided for the audit.

redesign_priorities: 1. Resolve the blank page issue to ensure content is visible.
2. Verify that the website is live and accessible to the public.
3. Re-audit the actual website design once the visual content is available.
